name: DATA_DATE
description: 設置BQ預設值 CURRENT_DATE()

name: CUID
description: HES.customer.CUID

name: SERIAL_NUMBER
description: HES.application.SERIAL_NUMBER

name: CREATED_AT
description: HES.application.CREATED_AT

name: GEO_TYPE
description: 發查類型：RESIDENCE_ADDRESS / CONTACT_ADDRESS / CONTRACT_COORDINATES

name: REQUEST_LONGITUDE
description: if CONTRACT_COORDINATES: VMB.apply_info.LONGITUDE，else: NULL。取小數點後4位

name: REQUEST_LATITUDE
description: if CONTRACT_COORDINATES: VMB.apply_info.LATITUDE，else: NULL。取小數點後4位

name: REQUEST_ADDRESS
description: if RESIDENCE_ADDRESS: HES.customer.PERMANENT_DETAILED_ADDRESS；elif CONTACT_ADDRESS: HES.customer.CURRENT_DETAILED_ADDRESS；else: NULL

name: RESPONSE_PLACE_ID
description: 取下行 place_id，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_ADDRESS
description: 取下行 formatted_address，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_GLOBAL_CODE
description: 取下行 plus_code.global_code，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_PLACE_TYPES
description: 取下行 types，來源是 LIST，以逗號合併為字串，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_LONGITUDE
description: 取下行 geometry.location.lng，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_LATITUDE
description: 取下行 geometry.location.lat，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_COUNTRY
description: 取下行 address_components，若 types 有 country，取 long_name，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_CITY
description: 取下行 address_components，若 types 有 administrative_area_level_1，取 long_name，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_DISTRICT
description: 取下行 address_components，若 types 有 administrative_area_level_2，取 long_name，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_WARD
description: 取下行 address_components，若 types 有 sublocality_level_1，取 long_name，取不到為 NULL

name: RESPONSE_STREET
description: 取下行 address_components，若 types 有 route，取 long_name，取不到為 NULL

name: BQ_CREATED_TIME
description: 設置BQ預設值 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()

name: BQ_UPDATED_TIME
description: 設置BQ預設值 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
